text:
遡行召喚の準備は全て整った。
召喚対象……全知存在。

ハリエット……君は最高の器だ。
かの存在の受け皿となり
今度こそ君は、生まれ変わる。

何、怖がることはない。
これは死ではなく新生だ。

生まれ変わるんだ、君は。
その器に相応しき魂を宿して。

そして、君と共に……
僕は今度こそ全てを識る！

兄様……いえ、ルーサー。
貴方はその先に、何を見るのです？
……科学者に学の価値を問う気かい？

私がこの身を捨てることで、民が……
世界が、救われるのであれば
喜んでこの身を捧げましょう。

……しかし、そうでないのなら
ここで散らすわけにはいきません。

私は、力を持たない人々を
救うために、ここにいる。
ハリエットとして、ここに。

他ならない、貴方の手によって
そのように……そのために
喚ばれたのですから！

喚んだ……僕の手で……？
何を言う、ハリエットは
あの時、ここでその身を……！
……っ、ぐっ、ぐううううっ！
ハリエットさん！　ご無事ですか！

守護輝士！　シエラさん！
来てくれたのですね！
……貴様達、どうやってここに。

貴方が
言った通りの場所でしたね。
つまりあれは、すべて真実……

また、か……！
また現れるか、貴様！
いつもいつもいつもいつも僕の邪魔を！
また、ですって？
乗っ取られているのか
【敗者】の記憶か

……そう、みたいですね。
【敗者】の狂乱した際の様子に
似ています。

……そう、ですよね。
【敗者】でなければ
あんな言葉は出てこないはずです。

【敗者】……【敗者】。
そうだ、我が名は【敗者】。
全知へ至る者！

貴様……
アークス風情が、僕の邪魔を！
一度ならず、二度までも……！
シエラはハリエットと避難を
ダークファルスの相手は任せて
気をつけてくださいね！

The pieces are all in place. It's time to perform
the quantum conjuration... on the Akashic Records.

And Hariette... What a perfect vessel you'll be.
Just think: you'll be reborn at last as an almighty being!

What's wrong? There's nothing to fear.
This isn't death... It's a new beginning.

You'll play host for something far greater.
Its soul will keep yours company in that body.
And with your help... At last, infinite knowledge will be mine!

And then what, Luther... if that's who you even are?
What do you see when all of that is said and done?
Are you questioning a scientist on the value of his work?

If my life is the cost of helping save our people--or perhaps
even the world--then you can have it. I'll give it gladly.

But you seem to have something else in mind, so I think
I'll choose to die for something far greater

-is so I can fight for those
who cannot fight for themselves.

And as the one who brought me here for that very purpose...
You should know better, Luther!

Brought you here? But that can't be... I saw you!
You were right here, Hariette, you were laying right here--
N-Ngh! Gaaaahhh!
Hariette! Are you all right?
Guardian! Xiera! I was hoping you'd come!
How did you meddlers find this place?

It's right where you said it would be. I guess that means...
Everything you saw was real.

I can't believe this. You find a way to be a thorn in
my side every--single--TIME! Were you BORN to destroy
my work!?
Hold on... "every time"?
Is he possessed?
He has [Luther]'s memories.

Looks like it. He's behaving just like the Fallen did
when he lost control.
Right. No one else but the Fallen would have said that.

Fallen...? [Luther]... the Fallen. Yes, it is I...
The man who will become one with the Akashic Records!

And YOU... You ARKS pissant!
Trying to thwart me just once didn't satisfy you!?
Xiera, take Hariette and run!
Leave this Dark Falz to me.
Please be careful!
